## SECTION 9 — This Day in History (India)
On October 5, 1932, the incredibly massive, absolutely critical, and historically foundational Indian Air Force (IAF) was officially and aggressively established. Following absolute independence, the incredibly massive IAF evolved into the absolute, formidable tip of the spear for the Indian military, fundamentally securing massive, absolute air superiority during the incredibly brutal Indo-Pakistani wars.

On October 5, 1524, Rani Durgavati, the incredibly massive, fiercely courageous, and fiercely independent ruling Queen of Gondwana, was officially born.
